summary: Frontend-only follow-up verification completed on public URL after DeferredChart size-guard refactor. Company detail sheet opens, Overview/Dividend/Valuation tabs render, and repeated Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings were not reproduced in this run.
action_items: Optional: run one longer console soak (more rapid tab toggles + open/close cycles) to further increase confidence on warning elimination.
Optional: keep sheet-scoped selectors in future UI automation to avoid off-viewport duplicate-tab locator noise.
critical_code_review_comments: DeferredChart measurable-size guard is correctly wired across Overview/Dividend/Valuation tabs and prevents premature chart mount.
No functional regressions observed in the requested company-detail flow after chart rendering change.
One automation-only failure was due to a non-scoped locator hitting an off-viewport element, not a product bug.
seed_data_creation: None. Company dataset remains STATIC SEEDED FRONTEND DATA.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated live app at https://fundamental-checker.preview.emergentagent.com. Opened company detail (BBRI and first-row path), switched chart tabs repeatedly, and confirmed tab content/containers render without reproducing prior Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning in this cycle. Artifacts: /app/test_reports/artifacts/iteration4_detail_tabs.jpeg.
rca of the issue: Prior warning likely came from chart initialization before measurable container size during Sheet/Tab transition. Current DeferredChart + ResizeObserver + width/height guard appears to mitigate this in tested flows.
